name: San Antonio Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 15 oz. can black beans, rinsed and drained
1 1/2 cups jalapeno Monterey Jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine cooked rice, corn, and black beans.
3. Add salsa, cumin, garlic powder, and half the cheese (3/4 cup) to the bowl.
4. Spoon the mixture into an 8x12 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray.
5. Bake, covered, for about 25 minutes.
6. Remove cover and sprinkle with remaining half of cheese.
7. Bake for another 15 minutes.
8. Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
